purpose: User-invocable forked-context Opus skill (`!p_track_resume`). Resume protocol for stalled/interrupted/partially-completed swarms. 5 phases / 16+ steps: Phase 1 State Reconstruction (resolve dashboard, read full state, read plan.json — regenerate if missing, read project context, rebuild upstream cache); Phase 2 Health Check & Classification (check agent health via 10-min/20-min activity windows, classify each task as Completed/Failed/Likely Alive/Stale In-Progress/Pending Ready/Pending Blocked, present resume plan, await approval); Phase 3 Cleanup, Dispatch, Monitor (clean stale progress files, build self-contained worker prompts with RESUME CONTEXT block including PREVIOUS ATTEMPT details, dispatch all ready tasks); Phase 4 Execution Loop (process completions, eager dispatch, handle monitoring/failures/compaction); Phase 5 Completion (update task file, append final log, post-swarm verification, compute metrics, NON-NEGOTIABLE final report with Resume Details section, save to history).
gotchas: Health classification thresholds: 10 min for milestone activity, 20 min for started_at — older = stale
Likely-alive workers must NOT be re-dispatched — would clobber a running agent and produce double work
Stage 'completed' but status 'in_progress' = Likely Completed (worker finished but master never processed return)
Plan.json regeneration is required if missing/invalid — hooks block dispatch otherwise
Final report includes a REQUIRED 'Resume Details' section listing tasks completed-before-resume / re-dispatched-stale / retried-failed / dispatched-fresh / agents-found-alive
Worker prompt for re-dispatch includes PREVIOUS ATTEMPT subsection with prior status/stage/summary/milestones/logs/deviations + ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS + REMEDIATION GUIDANCE
context: fork — runs in a forked Claude context; model: opus
patterns: Multi-phase resume: state -> classification -> dispatch -> execution -> completion
Health check via activity windows (10 min / 20 min)
RESUME CONTEXT prompt block with deeply-nested previous-attempt context
conventions: Same final-report structure as p-track but with extra Resume Details section
Same dispatch and validation gates apply (validate-plan-required, validate-approval-gate)
